title: CNMD - ParticipatoryBudget schema
description: Schema for a proposal submitted to a participatory budget.

address.description: Property. Address associated with the proposal.

addressCountry.description: Property. Country in which the proposal is located.

addressLocality.description: Property. Locality, which must correspond to the municipality.

addressRegion.description: Property. NUTS 2 region in which the locality is located.

district.description: Property. Administrative district in which the locality is located.

postalCode.description: Property. Postal code of the address.

streetAddress.description: Property. Street address associated with the proposal.

streetNr.description: Property. Street number associated with the proposal.

type.description: Property. NGSI entity type. It must be ParticipatoryBudget.

applicant.description: Property. Name of the proposal applicant.

category.description: Property. Categories assigned to the proposal.

dataProvider.description: Property. Identifier of the entity data provider.

dateCreated.description: Property. Date and time when the entity was created, in ISO 8601 format.

dateFinished.description: Property. Date and time when the proposal intervention finished, in ISO 8601 format.

dateModified.description: Property. Date and time when the entity was last modified, in ISO 8601 format.

dateStarted.description: Property. Date and time when the proposal intervention started, in ISO 8601 format.

dateSubmission.description: Property. Date and time when the proposal was submitted, in ISO 8601 format.

description.description: Property. Textual description of the proposal.

edition.description: Property. Short identifier of the participatory budget edition, such as OP2025.

estimatedBudget.description: Property. Estimated financial investment associated with the proposal, normally expressed in euros.

owner.description: Property. Unique identifiers of the proposal owners.

seeAlso.description: Property. URIs pointing to additional resources about the proposal.

source.description: Property. URL identifying the original source of the entity data.

status.description: Property. Current status of the proposal.

votes.description: Property. Number of votes received by the proposal.
